package rulefixtures

// scenario for mutex_value_receiver: `func (s MyStruct) Method()` where `MyStruct` contains a `sync.Mutex` or `sync.RWMutex` field
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule619PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario619Positive(records []Rule619PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
